headline.vsl_adaptation: For 40 years, I was in indigestion hell. The PPIs were the only thing keeping me alive - until I read an FDA warning that scared me to death...

lead.opening_verbatim: Here's My Story: I've Suffered With Acid Reflux for Almost 40 Years Now. Unless you experience it; you can't imagine how horrible it is. Every time I ate spicy foods I would get what I called 'ROT GUT'. Like something was rotting in my stomach. But now I can eat anything... No matter how spicy.
lead.hook_mechanism: 40-year suffering credibility + 'ROT GUT' visceral description + transformation tease
lead.transition_to_body: Let me explain... For the better part of my life; I purposely avoided a lot of foods.

mechanism.mechanism_name: Natural Acid Neutralization (vs. dangerous PPI inhibition)
mechanism.mechanism_description: Unlike PPIs that block stomach acid and cause bone fractures, AloeCure naturally soothes and protects the digestive tract. It has a pleasant grape flavor and provides relief without the dangerous side effects of proton pump inhibitors.

proof_elements.verbatim: I've Suffered With Acid Reflux for Almost 40 Years
FDA WARNING! Using proton pump inhibitors (PPIs) on a long term basis, increases your risk of hip, bone and spinal fractures
Recommended treatment for Prilosec, Prevacid, and all other PPIs is only 14 days. I TOOK THEM FOR 14 YEARS!
Italian food - my worst enemy. But for the first time in 40 years I didn't get indigestion

key_sections.content_verbatim: I'd experience a burning sensation through my esophagus - like somebody poured hot lead or battery acid down my throat. Add to that, those disgusting 'mini-throw ups' and I was in 'indigestion hell'.

FDA WARNING! Using proton pump inhibitors (PPIs) on a long term basis, increases your risk of hip, bone and spinal fractures. That's a particular concern to me, since many acid blockers are PPI's. I've gone through two back surgeries and bilateral hip replacements.
The Recommended treatment for Prilosec, Prevacid, and all other PPIs is only 14 days. I TOOK THEM FOR 14 YEARS!

I knew I had to stop or else risk developing spinal stenosis. My mother had that. And I watched her die a horrible death. Her spine just fractured. It was the worst death. She didn't deserve that. And neither do I.

Then one day at dinner, a friend of mine said 'why don't you try an aloe drink?' I said 'aloe drink'? Jeez. That doesn't sound good at all! The next day he brought me a case of something called Aloe Cure.

narrative_flow.story_arc: 40-year suffering → PPI dependency → FDA warning → fear → friend recommendation → skepticism → miraculous relief
narrative_flow.byline: By Ralph Burns; 'Former' acid reflux sufferer

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: Exceptional first-person story selling with powerful FDA fear hook
notable_elements: The FDA warning creates legitimate fear without making medical claims
The 14 days vs 14 years comparison is devastating
Photo of Ralph eating Lobster Fra Diavolo adds visual proof
extraction_notes.key_insight: Using real FDA warnings as the fear hook gives legitimacy that invented fears never could - the product positions against documented drug dangers, not hypothetical ones
